$comment: Layer A for LOCKER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (group REDEFINES RG). Generated member ids span PIC 9(4) and cents span PIC 9(6); each pair is read as text, NUMVAL'd into the record leaves, and reinterpreted through the group money view. The small-value bias exercises the sub-dollar region and the 200.00 tier boundary.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 LOCKER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-locker)
